text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that usually require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. One important part of AI is machine learning, where computers learn from data instead of following strict instructions. A more advanced type is deep learning, which uses complex networks to process information like the human brain. AI is already part of our daily life. For example, it recommends videos on streaming platforms, powers virtual assistants like Siri or Alexa, and helps doctors diagnose diseases. As technology improves, AI will become even more common.
